title: Hard Feelings
notes: No handwritten chord chart available yet - lyrics only

lines.lyrics: When the shadow he came and held his arms out wide
Corralled in all the meek and took them for a ride
He shot the hate right through the ceiling
What's yours is mine but no hard feelings
We were on the mend feeling alive and proud
Till they cast a vote and then dispersed a cloud
Just breathe it in forget the dealings
And put away any hard feelings
Who in the world you trying to please?
As the whole earth shakes and we fall to our knees
You can cast a stone and make us bleed
But you'll never ever be free
So let us bind together and save what's right
I know right now it seems that there's no end in sight
You know it's nothing short of treason
Just let it burn and no hard feelings
I'm ready now to start the healing
So don't tell me don't hard feelings
